raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing a {$1000.00} charge from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX on XX/XX/year>XXXX  ( Barclays case XXXX ). I purchased the rental companys Collision Damage Waiver at the time of rental. I submitted all supporting documentation to Barclays, including the rental contract, accident confirmation, and correspondence. 

Their response stated the true nature of the dispute was not provided, but gave no explanation of what information was missing or whether my documentation was reviewed. 

I request that Barclays provide clarification of the dispute reason code used, confirm that my documentation was reviewed, and reconsider the claim based on the materials already submitted. 

I have not involved my personal New York insurance because I was not at fault, and the other drivers insurer has accepted responsibility.
